title: Twenty-six new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta June 29
summary: On June 29, YKHC reports twenty-six new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 26 residents are in: Akiachak (1) Aniak (1) Atmautluak (1) Bethel (8) Kongiganak (1) Kwethluk (3) Marshall (2) Mountain Village (1) Napakiak (1) Quinhagak (1) St. Mary’s (4) Tuntutuliak (1) Tununak (1)...

title: Chugach Board of Directors  Endorse Lisa Murkowski for U.S. Senate
summary: Senator Murkowski is a lifelong Alaskan who has served the state of Alaska in the U.S. Senate since 2002, and previously in the Alaska State Legislature from 1999 until 2002. During both tenures, she has proven to be a fierce advocate for Alaska, and has championed critical issues that address the needs of Alaska Native peop...

title: Emergency Training Returns to SCF Raise Program
summary: Emergency Training Returns to SCF Raise Program By Public Relations Assistant Shamika Andrew Emergency Trauma Technology training returned to the Southcentral Foundation Raise Program. The training is a 40-hour, hands-on course that teaches medical terminology, CPR, and the assessment and treatment...

title: United States hog inventory down 1%
summary: As of June 1, there were 72.5 million hogs and pigs on U.S. farms, down 1% from June 2021 and down slightly from March 1, 2022, according to the Quarterly Hogs and Pigs report published today by the U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS).

title: Voices of Alaska: Rescue Swimmer Ethan McKenzie
summary: Coast Guard rescue swimmer Ethan McKenzie says there is more to the job than jumping out of a helicopter and saving people. The post Voices of Alaska: Rescue Swimmer Ethan McKenzie appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
